description_long: This object is a large, rectangular radio receiver with a robust, black exterior and a prominent speaker grille covering the entire front face. The top section features a control panel with multiple rotary knobs, push buttons, and indicator lights, as well as a visible brand logo. The rear side is equipped with various input/output ports, switches, and a recessed handle for easier transport. Both sides of the object have molded handles, suggesting it is designed to be portable despite its size and weight. The overall construction appears to be a combination of metal and durable plastic, with reinforced corners for protection. The finish is matte with subtle metallic highlights, giving it a professional and rugged appearance suitable for urban or performance environments.
description: A large, black radio receiver with a full front speaker grille, top-mounted control panel, and reinforced handles for portability. The design is robust and professional, with multiple knobs and ports visible.
description_view_0: The front view shows the expansive speaker grille and the top control panel with several knobs, buttons, and a visible brand logo.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a molded handle for carrying and the solid, unadorned side panel.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a recessed handle, multiple input/output ports, switches, and technical labels.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, featuring another molded handle and a plain side surface.
